steps.expected: Grid shows checkbox, Term, Definition columns and Add Term button to /admin/kb/glossary/add
steps.observed: Grid rendered with Select row checkboxes, Term/Definition columns, and Add Term link to /admin/kb/glossary/add
Grid filtered to single API row with "1 term(s) total"
Order changed from [.htaccess, 404 Error, ...] to [Database, Cache, ...]

steps.expected: UI row count matches glossary table
steps.observed: UI showed 7 term(s); SQLite query returned count=7

evidence.network: GET /api/admin/glossary?page=1&limit=20&sort=term&order=asc observed in browser; curl to same endpoint returned 200 with total=7

steps.expected: Form shows Term and Definition fields
steps.observed: Form rendered with Term* and Definition fields
Validation message "Term is required" shown on add form

steps.expected: New row inserted, redirect to grid, success flash
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/kb/glossary, flash "Glossary term created", DB row inserted with g_id=10

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/glossary observed from UI flow; subsequent GET /api/admin/glossary list refresh observed

steps.observed: Term and Definition fields pre-filled with previously created term values

steps.expected: DB updated, redirect to grid with success flash
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/kb/glossary with flash "Glossary term updated"; DB row 10 updated to ut_glossary_admin_20260319_a_edit

evidence.network: GET /api/admin/glossary/10 then PUT /api/admin/glossary/10 observed in browser network log

steps.observed: Bulk action combobox and Update button appeared after selecting checkbox
Flash showed "1 term(s) deleted"; DB count changed 8→7; deleted term removed while unselected term "Database" remained

evidence.network: DELETE /api/admin/glossary observed in browser network log

steps.expected: Redirect to glossary grid without server error
steps.observed: Client landed on /admin/kb/glossary with "Glossary term not found" flash; no console errors
curl GET /api/admin/glossary/999999 returned 404 JSON {"error":"Glossary term not found"}

evidence.network: Document GET /admin/kb/glossary/edit/999999 observed, followed by GET /api/admin/glossary/999999 (404) and UI redirect to /admin/kb/glossary

frictions.description: Bulk action dropdown/update controls are hidden until at least one row checkbox is selected.
frictions.resolution: Selected a glossary row first; controls appeared and delete action became available.

frictions.description: Invalid edit route handling is SPA/client-driven (document request returns SPA shell; not an HTTP 302 redirect).
frictions.resolution: Captured final redirected UI state and supplemental API 404 evidence for invalid ID handling.

summary: Validated 5 glossary admin assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
